requirement_topic.en: Radio Performance - ACMA Radiocommunications Equipment Rules + AS/NZS 4268
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电性能 - ACMA无线电通信设备规则 + AS/NZS 4268
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電性能 - ACMA無線電通訊設備規則 + AS/NZS 4268

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other short-range transmitters supplied in Australia must comply with ACMA radiocommunications equipment requirements before supply. The mandatory legal instrument is the Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021, made under the Radiocommunications Act framework. For many low-power short-range devices, AS/NZS 4268 is used as the Australian/New Zealand radio test standard and evidence route for transmitter parameters such as frequency range, output power, unwanted emissions, and spectrum use. AS/NZS 4268 and other AS/NZS standards are voluntary presumption or evidence routes; the mandatory obligation is compliance with the ACMA radiocommunications rules.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的带Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee或其他短距离发射器的无线/物联网设备，须在供应前符合ACMA无线电通信设备要求。强制性法律文件为依据无线电通信法体系制定的《Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021》。对于许多低功率短距离设备，AS/NZS 4268通常作为澳大利亚/新西兰无线电测试标准和证据路径，用于发射频段、输出功率、无用发射和频谱使用等参数。AS/NZS 4268及其他AS/NZS标准是自愿的推定符合或证据路径；强制义务是符合ACMA无线电通信规则。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的帶Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee或其他短距離發射器的無線/物聯網裝置，須在供應前符合ACMA無線電通訊設備要求。強制性法律文件為依據無線電通訊法體系制定的《Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021》。對於許多低功率短距離裝置，AS/NZS 4268通常作為澳洲/紐西蘭無線電測試標準和證據路徑，用於發射頻段、輸出功率、無用發射和頻譜使用等參數。AS/NZS 4268及其他AS/NZS標準是自願的推定符合或證據路徑；強制義務是符合ACMA無線電通訊規則。

standards_or_laws: Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021 - mandatory ACMA radiocommunications equipment rules
Radiocommunications Act 1992 - enabling legislation for radiocommunications regulation
AS/NZS 4268 - Radio equipment and systems; short range devices; limits and methods of measurement (voluntary evidence route)

summary.en: In China, radio transmitters such as Wi-Fi and Bluetooth modules are commonly subject to SRRC/NRA type approval under the MIIT radio management framework before import or sale. China test reports and model approvals focus on Chinese frequency allocations, channel plans, output power, and occupied bandwidth. Those approvals are mandatory for China but do not establish Australian compliance because Australia applies ACMA equipment rules and Australian spectrum allocation and labelling obligations.
summary.zh: 在中国，Wi-Fi和蓝牙模块等无线电发射设备通常须依据工业和信息化部无线电管理体系取得SRRC/国家无线电管理型号核准后方可进口或销售。中国检测报告和型号核准侧重中国频率划分、信道规划、输出功率及占用带宽。这些核准在中国为强制要求，但不能证明澳大利亚合规，因为澳大利亚适用ACMA设备规则、澳大利亚频谱划分及标签义务。
summary.zht: 在中國，Wi-Fi和藍牙模組等無線電發射設備通常須依據工業和信息化部無線電管理體系取得SRRC/國家無線電管理型號核准後方可進口或銷售。中國檢測報告和型號核准側重中國頻率劃分、信道規劃、輸出功率及佔用頻寬。這些核准在中國為強制要求，但不能證明澳洲合規，因為澳洲適用ACMA設備規則、澳洲頻譜劃分及標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: SRRC/NRA Type Approval - mandatory pre-market radio approval for transmitters in China
PRC Radio Regulations and MIIT radio management requirements
GB 15629.11 and related WLAN technical standards

gap.en: Chinese SRRC approval does not substitute for ACMA radiocommunications compliance. The supplier should confirm Australian frequency bands and power limits, compile Australian evidence to AS/NZS 4268 or another accepted route, and keep compliance records before applying the RCM. Differences commonly arise in permitted bands, channel availability, maximum EIRP, spurious emissions, and device configuration for Australia.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC核准不能替代ACMA无线电通信合规。供应商应确认澳大利亚频段和功率限值，按AS/NZS 4268或其他可接受路径准备澳大利亚证据，并在加贴RCM前保存合规记录。常见差异包括允许频段、可用信道、最大EIRP、杂散发射及澳大利亚销售配置。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC核准不能取代ACMA無線電通訊合規。供應商應確認澳洲頻段和功率限值，按AS/NZS 4268或其他可接受路徑準備澳洲證據，並在加貼RCM前保存合規記錄。常見差異包括允許頻段、可用信道、最大EIRP、雜散發射及澳洲銷售配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory - Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021; AS/NZS 4268 is a voluntary evidence route, not the mandatory law itself
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory - SRRC/NRA type approval is required for in-scope radio transmitters before sale or import in China

source.publisher: Federal Register of Legislation / Australian Government

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Australia requires ACMA radiocommunications compliance for wireless transmitters before supply. AS/NZS 4268 is a common voluntary evidence route for short-range devices, while the binding obligation is the ACMA radiocommunications equipment rules. China SRRC approval is useful background evidence only and must be mapped to Australian limits.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】澳大利亚要求无线发射设备在供应前符合ACMA无线电通信要求。AS/NZS 4268是短距离设备常用的自愿证据路径，具有约束力的义务是ACMA无线电通信设备规则。中国SRRC核准仅可作为背景证据，仍须映射至澳大利亚限值。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】澳洲要求無線發射設備在供應前符合ACMA無線電通訊要求。AS/NZS 4268是短距離設備常用的自願證據路徑，具有約束力的義務是ACMA無線電通訊設備規則。中國SRRC核准僅可作為背景證據，仍須映射至澳洲限值。
